notes: Mix of post-hoc (released Pew URLs) and watchlist items. Prefer forward benchmarks: copy exact wording from a prior public Pew wave (e.g. May N-1), freeze, run Lewsearch before May N Pew drop; compare when published. Use scripts/discover_pew_benchmarks.py to refresh candidates.

candidates.title: National problems: healthcare, deficit, inflation
candidates.why_benchmarkable: Clean economic anxiety toplines; methodology page exists for population + dates.

candidates.title: Deportations: too much / too little (Trump administration)
candidates.why_benchmarkable: Single-issue attitude track; often repeatable series.
candidates.population_public: U.S. adults (confirm dates on methodology when linked from article)

candidates.title: Iran / military action views
candidates.why_benchmarkable: High-salience foreign policy; good test for news-context injection.

candidates.title: Trump approval, personal traits, party favorability
candidates.why_benchmarkable: Multi-item battery; pick 1–2 items for v1 to avoid scope explosion.

candidates.title: Party favorability (both parties negative)
candidates.why_benchmarkable: Stable-ish favorability framing; useful for bracket vs traits story.

candidates.title: Social media + health (expected follow-up / series)
candidates.why_benchmarkable: If Pew releases a topline + methodology, strong fit for Lewsearch narrative tests.
candidates.risks: Instrument may not be public immediately; do not guess wording.

candidates.title: Home insurance + energy costs (expected follow-up)
candidates.why_benchmarkable: Economic pain + household budgeting; good for state panels.
candidates.risks: Homeowner vs renter framing may differ; match Pew population label exactly.

candidates.title: Attitudes on homosexuality (expected follow-up)
candidates.why_benchmarkable: Sensitive social topic; test bracketing + age splits once Pew instrument public.

candidates.title: Immigration policy (broad follow-up)
candidates.why_benchmarkable: Often repeated; watch for new vs trend continuation wording.

candidates.title: Government ethics + Iran / military actions (combo track)
candidates.why_benchmarkable: May split into separate items; use only if Pew bundles with clear items.
